context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified: 1) Exactly 21 Bulgarian stores in /api/scrape/stores including new Technomarket. 2) CAD page (/ai-sketch) toolbar has NO 'Покрив' button. 3) Manual add buttons are: Стена, Плоча, Стълби, Врата, Прозорец, Колона, Греда (no Покрив). 4) 'Дълбочина' label completely removed from CAD - replaced with 'Височина' for slab depth dimension. Wall uses: Дължина, Дебелина, Височина. Slab uses: Широчина, Височина, Дебелина. Auth required via AuthGate modal with comm2@test.bg/Test123!. Key data-testids: tool-*, add-*-btn, structure-panel, dims-*, obj-*.
